_info.description: Firestore DB schema — import this as reference when configuring Firebase Console

user_files._description: Stores metadata for every PDF saved to cloud by a logged-in user.

uid.description: Firebase Auth UID of the file owner

pages.description: Total page count of the merged PDF (optional)

tool.description: Which tool was used to produce this file

storagePath.description: Full storage path e.g. users/{uid}/merged_2026-05-02_21-15-00.pdf — used for deletion

createdAt.description: Server timestamp — use serverTimestamp() when writing

security_rules.note: Paste these rules in Firebase Console → Firestore → Rules
security_rules.rules: rules_version = '2'; service cloud.firestore { match /databases/{database}/documents { match /user_files/{docId} { allow read, delete: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.uid; allow create: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.uid; } } }

storage_rules.note: Paste these rules in Firebase Console → Storage → Rules
storage_rules.rules: rules_version = '2'; service firebase.storage { match /b/{bucket}/o { match /users/{uid}/{allPaths=**} { allow read, write, delete: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == uid; } } }
